evals.prompt: Is my bot still running? Can you do a quick health check?
evals.expected_output: Report with three sections: Log (errors/warnings from bot.log, most recent bar-tick line), Data freshness (last bar timestamp per symbol with staleness flag if >5 min), Active config (all parameters in compact grouped format). Handles missing files gracefully.

evals.prompt: Check my bot — I think there might be an error in the logs. Also tell me what config it's running with.
evals.expected_output: All ERROR and WARNING lines from the last 60 lines of bot.log shown clearly. Active config displayed in compact grouped format. Data freshness check included.
